description_long: This apple is round and plump, with a smooth, slightly glossy skin. Its coloration is a blend of pale yellow-green and vibrant red, with the red hues appearing in streaks and patches across the surface. The top of the apple features a small, recessed stem cavity with a short, stubby stem visible. The skin appears unblemished and taut, with subtle natural speckling and color gradients typical of fresh apples. The overall shape is slightly asymmetrical, with one side appearing a bit fuller than the other. The apple's surface reflects light softly, indicating a fresh and firm texture.
description: A round, smooth apple with red and yellow-green streaked skin and a small stem.
description_view_0: Red and yellow-green streaks dominate, with the stem cavity visible at the top.
description_view_1: Paler yellow-green side with faint red blush, stem less prominent.
description_view_2: Balanced mix of yellow-green and red, subtle color gradients.
description_view_3: Redder side with more saturated streaks, stem cavity visible.
